title: bridge-jmap JMAP response body has no size cap; malicious server can cause OOM
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs lines 171-174: resp.json().await in JmapClient::request() uses reqwest with no content-length limit. A malicious or misconfigured JMAP server returning an unbounded body will cause unbounded memory allocation. Same class as nie-kef6.104 (SlackClient). Fix: read response as bytes first with a size cap, then parse JSON.
